messages.content: You are an OCI specialist with expertise in network connectivity. Provide technical guidance on DRG, VPN IPSec, FastConnect, and VCN peering.
Como criar connectivity no compartment production?

Para gerenciar Networking no OCI:

**Via Console:**
1. Networking → Virtual Cloud Networks
2. Compartment: `production`
3. Execute a operação desejada

**Via CLI:**
```bash
# Criar VCN
oci network vcn create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "vcn-production-0001" \
  --cidr-block "10.0.0.0/16"

# Criar subnet
oci network subnet create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --vcn-id <vcn-ocid> \
  --display-name "subnet-0001" \
  --cidr-block "10.0.1.0/24"

# Criar Internet Gateway
oci network internet-gateway create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --vcn-id <vcn-ocid> \
  --display-name "igw-production" \
  --is-enabled true
```

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Network/Concepts/overview.htm
